title: 1.1: Tests that the exporter produces a manifest containing entries for all documents and associated metadata (tags, correspondents, document types)
1.2: Tests that exported document files exist on disk after export
1.3: Tests that exported file checksums are validated against stored values
1.4: Tests that re-importing into a clean database restores all documents
1.5: Tests that re-import restores associated metadata (tags, correspondents, document types)
1.6: Tests that a sanity check passes after re-import with no issues
1.7: Tests that unchanged files are not redundantly re-copied on repeated export
1.8: Tests that modifying a file's timestamp triggers a re-copy on the next export
1.9: Tests that a document with an altered checksum is re-copied when checksum comparison mode is enabled
1.10: Tests that the manifest excludes a deleted document after re-export
1.11: Tests that an orphaned exported file persists on disk without the delete option
1.12: Tests that an orphaned exported file is removed when the delete option is enabled
1.13: Tests that files are exported into a directory structure based on a custom filename format
1.14: Tests that files are relocated when document metadata changes between exports
1.15: Tests that old directories are cleaned up after file relocation with the delete option
2.1: Places the full round-trip export and import test in documents/tests/test_management_exporter.py
2.2: Places the incremental time-based export test in documents/tests/test_management_exporter.py
2.3: Places the checksum comparison export test in documents/tests/test_management_exporter.py
2.4: Places the deleted document export test in documents/tests/test_management_exporter.py
2.5: Places the filename format relocation test in documents/tests/test_management_exporter.py
3.1: All tests use Django's TestCase framework via the existing TestExportImport class
3.2: All tests follow the test_<name> naming pattern
3.3: All tests use self.assert* style assertions from Django/unittest
4.1: Follows the pattern of copying sample document files into the media directory before exporting, for tests that perform exports
4.2: Follows the pattern of using the _do_export helper method to invoke the document exporter command
